help: Triangular priors on the 2075 target fractions for CAV fleet share and STI coverage. These are scenario-defining assumptions, NOT residual background uncertainty. The central value is the user's chosen target; the uncertainty band around it reflects residual uncertainty conditional on that chosen scenario, not uncertainty about whether the target is 'true'. Ohio-specific supports reflect slower AV-regulation and grid-modernization trajectories.

parameters.label: CAV 2075 target fraction
parameters.physical_meaning: Fraction of the 2075 fleet that is a Connected Autonomous Vehicle; linear ramp from 2024 initial CAV count. This is a scenario-defining assumption: it sets the policy-design target. The displayed uncertainty band reflects residual uncertainty conditional on the chosen scenario, not uncertainty about whether the user-selected target is true.
parameters.citation: No single external source anchors the 2075 target. State-level AV pilot data (CA DMV autonomous-vehicle reports; Ohio DriveOhio corridor assessments) inform the regional differentiation.
parameters.why_default_free: Primary scenario-design lever. The reader should see a scenario envelope around the chosen target. LOW keeps it narrow and decision-meaningful.
parameters.region_note: Ohio centre 0.30 (vs CA 0.45) reflects Ohio's historically slower AV regulation and lower pilot deployment density (OHIO_PARAMETER_PRIOR_JUSTIFICATION.md).

parameters.label: STI 2075 target coverage
parameters.physical_meaning: Fraction of intersections carrying Smart Traffic Infrastructure in 2075. This is a scenario-defining assumption. The displayed uncertainty band reflects residual uncertainty conditional on the chosen scenario, not whether the target is 'true'.
parameters.citation: No single external source. Informed by Caltrans 2024-2029 V2X upgrade plans (CA) and Ohio US-33 smart corridor deployment (OH).
parameters.why_default_free: Second scenario-design lever. Same rationale as F23.
parameters.region_note: Ohio centre 0.30 (vs CA 0.50) reflecting slower intersection-modernization cadence.
